title: Confirm: unit-test runner wired (tsx) completes ADR 0001 task 4
description: Extended settled ADR 0001 by wiring Node's built-in test runner via tsx and adding npm test/test:watch scripts; amount validator suite is 12/12 green. This adds a devDependency (tsx@^4) to the shared repo. Tasks 5-6 (SMS/OCR + Plaid adapters) remain blocked on adapters not yet present. Confirm the test-tooling choice (tsx over vitest) and that the delivery agent should pick up 5-6 only once those adapters land.

title: Code Review verdict: REQUEST_CHANGES — ADR 0001 task 4 test-runner wiring
description: npm test runs green (12/12, verified) but covers only the ledger validator — 4 existing @playwright/test unit suites under e2e/ are excluded by the src/**/*.test.ts glob, and the ADR's 'zero new framework surface' rationale is inverted (node:test IS a second framework). Also: prior Number()-coercion finding (amount.ts:77, '1e5'->100000) is still open on second review with no test. Decide how to resolve before this is treated as the CI unit-test gate.

title: Security Scan — 4 findings for triage (0 critical, 3 medium, 1 low)
description: First full security scan of ai-bookkeeper completed (all 3 phases). No critical/high. Decide remediation timing for each finding below — the two Medium items (dependency CVE dedupe and the recurring input-boundary coercion gap) are the actionable ones.

title: Approve release v0.2.0 — push tag & commit version bump
description: Release v0.2.0 is staged: package.json bumped to 0.2.0, annotated tag v0.2.0 created on HEAD (18fab0f), release notes written to docs/releases/v0.2.0.md, and the existing CHANGELOG [0.2.0] entry preserved. The version bump and release notes are uncommitted in the working tree alongside unrelated WIP. Approve to push the tag and commit the release artifacts.
